deltarune-0.0.2.description:
- Fixed you being in the wall after the Susie + Lancer battle if you entered the battle through the door.
- Changed the Top Cake item to be a key item instead of a consumable.
- Added a MacGuffin item for fighting the King in Chapter 1, with a setting for how many.
- Added a dummy option to notify the user of how it handles having more items than locations.
deltarune-0.0.2.title: Deltarune: Preview 2

deltarune-0.0.3.description:
- Fixed the prison door removing the broken keys when opened
- Changed the game to use DELTARUNEAP as a save folder
deltarune-0.0.3.title: Deltarune: Preview 3

deltarune-0.0.4.description: - Moved the forest blockade to before C. Round, since you are forced into the forest after that fight, which also would send out the Forest Warp Door check
deltarune-0.0.4.title: Deltarune: Preview 4

deltarune-0.0.5.description:
- Fixed everything I was notified of being bugged.
- Initial Chapter 2 options and locations. **DO NOT ENABLE ANY CH2 OPTIONS, THEY ARE NOT YET FULLY FUNCTIONAL**
deltarune-0.0.5.title: Deltarune: Preview 5

deltarune-0.0.5.2.description: - Made the patch work with the latest Deltarune
deltarune-0.0.5.2.title: Deltarune: Preview 5 Hotfix 2

v0.2.3.description:
**Changelog**

- Lancer no longer materializes the "Board 2 Game Cartridge" out of thin air
- Changed some item and location names
- "Include Hidden/Grindy items" now defaults to "false"
- "100 Dark Dollars" and "50 POINTs" added to the random item pool for Chapters 2 and 3, respectively

**Known Issues:**

- Some Chapter 3 items might not give the proper effects in previous chapters? I didn't test every single item.
- The game, in rare cases, will randomly crashes sometimes. I cannot reproduce this and have not had this happen to me.
- Leaving the game open for an absurd amount of time crashes the client. (YOUR TAKING TOO LONG...) Restarting the client will fix this!
v0.2.3.title: AP DELTARUNE v0.2.3

v0.2.4.description:
(This APWorld is intended for DELTARUNE 1.04. Using a Beta or the Ch1+2 Demo will not work.)

**Changelog:**
- **Added Death Link option.** At long, long last! As a warning, long stretches without save points are going to be painful.
- **Added "Mandatory" option to Include Secret Bosses.** This adds extra roadblocks if you haven't beaten the secret boss yet.
- **Hints are now sent before purchasing an item in a shop.** (If I missed any lmk)
- **New Command!** Use **/chosen_route** to figure out which route you're doing if you set it to random.
- Locations related to "Man" in Chapter 3 are no longer included if you choose Weird Route
- Most instances of "Deltarune" have correctly been replaced with "DELTARUNE"
- "Top Chef" no longer gives you a "SpinCake" alongside its check in Chapter 2
- "Blackshard" now uses the correct attack sprite in previous chapters
- Most of the other Chapter 3 items work properly now, if there are any i missed lmk
- Chapter Completion data is now saved in the Multiworld
- Added an in-game warning if you disconnect while playing
- Asking "Zapper"  about "My Rank, My Rewards?" will resend checks related to the previous board, should they have not been sent.
- Doing "1225" at the "Gacha Machine" gives all golden prize checks if you haven't collected them all, at the expense of all of your points and D$1225
- A certain crash may be fixed.. still not 100% certain but let's hope

**Known Issues:**
- Leaving the game open for an absurd amount of time crashes the client. (YOUR TAKING TOO LONG...) Restarting the client will fix this!

As usual, make sure the Deltarune folder in the Archipelago folder is deleted before updating.

**Before connecting, use /savereset to reset all AP and save data for this mod. Don't worry; your original Deltarune saves won't be affected!**

Feel free to give feedback, and make sure to report any bugs!

**You will only give/receive checks in the Dark World.**
v0.2.4.title: AP DELTARUNE v0.2.4

v1.0.0.description:
**The fourth fate. The final prophecy.**

(This APWorld is intended for DELTARUNE 1.04. Using a Beta or the Ch1+2 Demo will not work.)

**Changelog:**
# - **Chapter 4 Added!**
- **New Option:** Item Balancing - Enable this option to balance item stats down if you get an item early
- **Implemented 30tbps mod**
- **Randomized Chapters now randomizes the starting chapter**
- Completion data is now actually stored in the Multiworld.. oops
- Renamed location checks for sealing fountains to add continuity
- Warp doors now require interacting with them to get a check, to avoid free checks
- You now get notified if you receive a check for a future chapter to slightly remedy waiting through 4.7 quintillion textboxes
- Event checks now work in all chapters (Moss, smile)
- Removed "King Chess Piece"
- Choosing "weird_route" now automatically unlocks route-exclusive cutscenes in Chapter 3
- Ramb no longer aurafarms in front of the controller room door if you visit him during TV World
- Losing to Lancer and Susie no longer softlocks you
- Getting DeathLink in light world should no longer crash you when you land in the dark world
- Grazing avatars in the Queen fight no longer crashes the game
- Door Key is now properly in logic if you choose "Mandatory" secret bosses
- Spamton story progress should no longer go down
- Spamton no longer materializes the EmptyDisk from thin air
- Death Link no longer forces you to restart the board

**Known Issues:**
- Getting a check during some cutscenes softlocks you after the cutscene finishes. If you get this lmk ASAP!

As usual, make sure the DELTARUNE folder in the Archipelago folder is deleted before updating.

**Before connecting, use /savereset to reset all AP and save data for this mod. Don't worry; your original Deltarune saves won't be affected!**

Feel free to give feedback, and make sure to report any bugs!

**You will only give/receive checks in the Dark World.**
v1.0.0.title: DELTARUNEAP v1.0.0

v1.0.3.description:
(This APWorld is intended for DELTARUNE 1.04. Using a Beta or the Ch1+2 Demo will not work.)

**Changelog:**
- Storage size increased to 6 pages (72 items in total)
- Seam/Rouxls now acknowledge you have storage in Chapter 1
- Death Link in the MANTLE/sword games should now work better
- Added support to skipping chapters
- You don't... you don't have to delete the DELTARUNE folder in the archipelago folder before updating now... it's... it's beautiful... 🥲 
- You can now obtain "OddController" if you wait until after TV World
- Fixed a Check in the Second Sanctuary not actually being obtainable
-  All blue checkmarks are now locations
- Spikeband is no longer in logic if you are not playing Chapter 1

**Before connecting, use /savereset to reset all AP and save data for this mod. Don't worry; your original Deltarune saves won't be affected!**

Feel free to give feedback, and make sure to report any bugs!

**You will only give/receive checks in the Dark World.**
